name: madlexa-skills
description: Plugins and skills for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Kimi Code).

plugins.name: niblet
plugins.description: The diligent crumb-keeper for AI coding sessions. Niblet auto-writes findings to the project KB after every turn and surfaces workflow-pattern proposals at session end for your review. Sanitized capture — no secrets stored in logs. Per-session isolated. POSIX shell — macOS/Linux native; Windows via WSL2 or Git Bash.
